channel.title: Android on sramazoth
channel.description: Recent content in Android on sramazoth

item.title: Root Galaxy A14
item.description: warning The phone is going to be reset two times. Ressources : Root All Samsung Galaxy 2023 Android 13 : to root the phone Samsung Bootloder Unlock Oem Unlock Android 13/14 : to deactivate OEM requirements firmware To find the phone firmware version it’s possible to navigate to : settings->about->software information->baseband version : A145RXXU1AWD1 Then we can download the corresponding file from https://samfw.com/firmware/SM-A145R/SFR/A145RXXU1AWD1. unzip SAMFW.COM_SM-A145R_SFR_A145RXXU1AWD1_fac.zip ll -rw-rw-r--. 1 pouetpouet pouetpouet 6038610042 18 avril 21:00 AP_A145RXXU1AWD1_A145RXXU1AWD1_MQB64354567_REV00_user_low_ship_MULTI_CERT_meta_OS13.
